summary: Completed testing NPD Tracker Iteration 4 features - light theme implementation, brand field (Hyphen/mCaffeine), 6 packaging classifications, NPD template with 29 critical steps in 5 phases, Color Bank removal, and Summary Dashboard. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend core features working with session management issues.

integration_issues.issue: Authentication session expires quickly during testing, requiring frequent re-login

passed_tests: Backend API: NPD Template returns exactly 29 steps in 5 phases (iteration 4 requirement)
Backend API: Projects with brand field (Hyphen/mCaffeine) and packaging classification
Backend API: Create project with iteration 4 fields (brand, pkg_class)
Backend API: All endpoints functional (GET /api/projects, POST /api/seed, GET /api/template/npd)
Backend API: Analytics metrics endpoint working
Frontend: Light theme applied - white/light gray background, white cards, dark blue sidebar
Frontend: Dashboard loads and displays project cards with brand badges
Frontend: Brand badges (mCaffeine, Hyphen) visible on project cards
Frontend: Color Bank tab successfully removed from sidebar navigation
Frontend: Summary page accessible from sidebar navigation
Frontend: Summary Dashboard with category grouping, brand/dept/RD/biz filters
Frontend: Summary Dashboard bulk CSV export button present and functional
Frontend: Timeline Analysis page works with light theme
Frontend: Manufacturers page works with light theme
Frontend: Dashboard shows 6 projects with proper light theme styling
Frontend: Sidebar has dark blue background with white text (iteration 4 theme)
Frontend: Project cards have white background with proper contrast

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (15/17 tests completed, 2 incomplete due to session timeout)

action_item_for_main_agent: Consider improving session management to prevent quick timeouts during user sessions. All core iteration 4 features (light theme, brand field, packaging classifications, NPD template with 29 steps, Color Bank removal) are working correctly.
